---
title: "Handbooks in Economics"
page-layout: article
---

# Handbooks in Economics

**Provider:** Elsevier

## Description

Full-text collection of scholarly handbooks in economics, finance, econometrics, and related fields. Supports literature review and advanced disciplinary research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature

## Links

- [Access resource](https://www.sciencedirect.com/browse/journals-and-books?subject=economics-econometrics-and-finance)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
